Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

(defect) For this to be useful the changelog entry must include the old FID and the new FID. With lfs I only see the new FID:

 
# mkdir d0
# lfs mv -M1 d0 
# lfs changelog lustre-MDT0000
5 02MKDIR 22:15:18.644993515 2015.10.01 0x0 t=[0x200000404:0x3:0x0] j=mkdir.0 p=[0x200000007:0x1:0x0] d0
6 20MIGRT 22:16:12.421998407 2015.10.01 0x0 t=[0x240000404:0x2:0x0] j=lfs.0 p=[0x200000007:0x1:0x0] d0

parents.subject: LU-7295 osp: do not warn on uncommitted changes

commit.subject: LU-6868 mdd: add changelog for migration
commit.message:
LU-6868 mdd: add changelog for migration

Add changelog for migration, so robinhood policy engine
can handle the migration command.

Add test_160d to verify the migration changelog

Signed-off-by: wang di <di.wang@intel.com>
Change-Id: Iaa33dee607fcd79285f59bd3131d70b7e5329622
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/16645
Tested-by: Jenkins
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: John L. Hammond <john.hammond@intel.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Henri Doreau <henri.doreau@cea.fr>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
